export.accountDataDescription: Only export account information and related data
export.description: Export data as a JSON file for backup
export.fullBackupDescription: Export account data and user settings. Use manual export/import when you need to migrate device-local settings instead of WebDAV sync.
export.title: Export Data
export.userSettingsDescription: Only export interface settings and preference configurations

import.dataInvalid: Data format error, please check JSON format
import.description: Restore data from a backup file
import.formatError: Data format error, please check JSON format
import.pasteJsonData: Paste JSON data or import via the file selector above...
import.selectFileImport: Please select file or input data to import
import.title: Import Data

notice.importWarning1: Imported data will overwrite existing data of the same type, please operate with caution
notice.importWarning2: It is recommended to export current data for backup before importing
notice.importWarning3: Only supports JSON format files exported by this extension
notice.importWarning4: Imported data may contain sensitive information (account tokens and API keys). Keep backups secure and only import from trusted sources

autoSync.description: Configure automatic sync for shared data. Device-local settings stay on the current device.
autoSync.enableDesc: When enabled, shared data will be synchronized to WebDAV at set intervals.
autoSync.intervalDesc: Set how often the automatic sync runs
autoSync.strategyDesc: Choose how data should be synchronized
autoSync.strategyLocalFirst: Local first - local data overrides remote data
autoSync.strategyMerge: Smart merge - merge local and remote data based on timestamps
autoSync.strategyRemoteFirst: Remote first - remote data overwrites local data
autoSync.title: WebDAV Auto Sync

webdav.configDesc: Configure WebDAV to sync shared data. Some device-local settings stay on this device and are not uploaded or overwritten.

encryption.decryptDialogDesc: This WebDAV sync data is encrypted. Try a password to import it.
encryption.decryptPrompt: Cannot decrypt automatically. Please enter your password.
encryption.enableDesc: Encrypt WebDAV sync data uploaded to the server with a password. You will need the same password to restore it.
encryption.passwordDesc: Used to encrypt data uploaded to WebDAV and decrypt data downloaded from WebDAV.
encryption.title: WebDAV Data Encryption

restorePolicy.description: WebDAV is meant for shared-data sync, not a full device backup. Your current device's WebDAV connection/encryption settings, sync selection, and account auto-refresh settings stay local and will not be uploaded to or overwritten from WebDAV. Use manual export/import when you need to migrate those device-local settings.
restorePolicy.title: Sync scope notice

syncData.description: Choose which shared data domains participate in WebDAV sync. Device-local preference items such as WebDAV settings, sync selection, and account auto-refresh stay on the current device, while channel configurations remain synced for compatibility.
syncData.selectionRequired: Select at least one data domain to sync
syncData.title: Sync data

webdav.title: WebDAV Sync
webdav.webdavUrlExample: For example: https://dav.example.com/{{filename}} full file URL or Webdav root directory URL
